description: The CT Cranium DICOM dataset is loaded in InVesalius 3. A biomedical engineer needs two 3D skull models for different purposes: a high-resolution one for detailed planning and a lower-resolution one for rapid prototyping. Create a bone segmentation mask (226-3071 HU). Generate a high-quality 3D surface and export it as a binary STL to /home/ga/Documents/skull_best.stl. Generate a second, lower-resolution 3D surface with a significantly lower triangle count and export it as a binary STL to /home/ga/Documents/skull_lowres.stl. Both files must be created in the same session.
